columns.column_name: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Synchronous
columns.extraction_plan: The PDF reports on 'de novo mHSPC' (synchronous) patients. This is found in the 'Metastasis stage at initial diagnosis' section of Table 1 on page 5, and also discussed in the abstract on page 1 and methods on page 2. Figure A1 on pages 16-17 also includes 'De novo' as a subgroup.

columns.column_name: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Metachronous
columns.extraction_plan: The PDF reports on 'Recurrent mHSPC' (metachronous) patients. This is found in the 'Metastasis stage at initial diagnosis' section of Table 1 on page 5, and also discussed in the abstract on page 1 and methods on page 2. Figure A1 on pages 16-17 also includes 'Recurrent' as a subgroup.

columns.column_name: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | High volume
columns.extraction_plan: The PDF reports on 'High Volume' patients. This is explicitly stated in the abstract on page 1, in the results section on page 4, and is a primary column in Table 1 (page 5), Table 2 (page 8), Table 3 (page 9), Table 4 (page 10), and Table A1 (page 18). Figures 2 and 3 (pages 6-7) and Figure A1 (pages 16-17) also present data by high-volume disease.

columns.column_name: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Low volume
columns.extraction_plan: The PDF reports on 'Low Volume' patients. This is explicitly stated in the abstract on page 1, in the results section on page 4, and is a primary column in Table 1 (page 5), Table 2 (page 8), Table 3 (page 9), Table 4 (page 10), and Table A1 (page 18). Figures 2 and 3 (pages 6-7) and Figure A1 (pages 16-17) also present data by low-volume disease.
